data.title: Olidata S.p.A. Announces Major Governance Restructuring
data.description:
Olidata S.p.A. ( (IT:OLI) ) has issued an announcement.

Olidata S.p.A. held a Shareholders’ Meeting and a Board of Directors meeting, resulting in significant changes to its governance structure. The number of directors was increased from 5 to 9, and four new directors were appointed, including Cristiano Rufini as the new Executive President. The Board also reorganized its internal committees and redefined the delegations within the administrative body. These changes aim to enhance the company’s operational efficiency and ensure continuity in its growth path, following a period of internal audits and restructuring.

More about Olidata S.p.A.

Olidata S.p.A. is a leading system integrator in Italy’s IT sector with shares listed on Euronext Milan, managed by Borsa Italiana S.p.A.

YTD Price Performance: -35.79%

Average Trading Volume: 119,166

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €39.75M

data.title: Banco Macro S.A. Announces Dividend Distribution Plan
data.description:
Banco Macro SA ( (BMA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 4, 2025, Banco Macro S.A. announced a decision made during its Shareholders’ Meeting to allocate a portion of its Optional Reserve Fund for Future Profit Distributions to pay a dividend of AR$ 313,997,329,740. This dividend, subject to approval by the Banco Central de la República Argentina, will be distributed in 10 monthly installments starting June 30, 2025, and will be adjusted according to the national consumer price index. This move reflects the bank’s strategy to enhance shareholder value while complying with regulatory requirements.

More about Banco Macro SA

Banco Macro S.A. is a financial institution based in Buenos Aires, Argentina, primarily engaged in providing banking services. The company focuses on offering a range of financial products and services, including loans, deposits, and investment solutions, catering to both individual and corporate clients.

YTD Price Performance: -31.66%

Average Trading Volume: 338,005

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $5.84B

data.title: TotalEnergies Discloses Managerial Shareholding Transactions
data.description:
The latest update is out from TotalEnergies SE ( (FR:TTE) ).

TotalEnergies SE has disclosed transactions by Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities (PDMR) in compliance with the UK Market Abuse Regulation. These transactions involve the reinvestment of dividends in the company’s employee shareholder plan and are part of TotalEnergies’ ongoing efforts to engage its executive committee members in its financial ecosystem. This move reflects the company’s commitment to aligning managerial interests with shareholder value, potentially strengthening its market position and stakeholder relations.

More about TotalEnergies SE

TotalEnergies is a global integrated energy company that produces and markets a diverse range of energies, including oil, biofuels, natural gas, biogas, low-carbon hydrogen, renewables, and electricity. With over 100,000 employees, the company is committed to providing reliable, affordable, and sustainable energy to people worldwide. Operating in about 120 countries, TotalEnergies places sustainability at the core of its strategy, projects, and operations.

Current Market Cap: €118.7B

data.title: Banco Macro SA Appoints New Audit Committee Members
data.description:
Banco Macro SA ( (BMA) ) has provided an update.

On April 4, 2025, Banco Macro SA announced the appointment of the regular members of its Audit Committee, which includes Mario Luis Vicens, Fabián Alejandro de Paul, and Sebastián Palla. Additionally, Fabián Alejandro de Paul has been designated as the Financial Expert of the Audit Committee, in compliance with the Sarbanes Oxley Act of 2002. This strategic appointment is expected to enhance the bank’s governance and oversight capabilities, potentially impacting its operational efficiency and stakeholder confidence.

More about Banco Macro SA

Banco Macro SA is a financial institution based in Buenos Aires, Argentina, primarily engaged in providing banking services. The company operates in the financial sector, focusing on offering a range of financial products and services to its clients.

data.title: Lion Finance Group PLC Announces Share Buyback Transaction
data.description:
The latest update is out from Bank of Georgia Group Plc ( (GB:BGEO) ).

Lion Finance Group PLC, listed on the London Stock Exchange, has announced a transaction involving the repurchase of its own shares. On April 4, 2025, Cavendish Capital Markets Limited purchased 3,578 ordinary shares on behalf of the company as part of an ongoing share buyback and cancellation program. The shares were bought at a volume-weighted average price of 4948.3674 pence per share, with the highest and lowest prices being 5130.0000 pence and 4776.0000 pence, respectively. These repurchased shares will be held in treasury until they are cancelled, which will adjust the total number of ordinary shares with voting rights to 44,143,962. This move is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Bank of Georgia Group Plc

data.title: Jupiter Fund Management Executes Share Buyback
data.description:
An update from Jupiter Fund Management Plc ( (GB:JUP) ) is now available.

Jupiter Fund Management Plc announced the repurchase of 350,000 of its ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange as part of its ongoing share buyback program. This transaction, executed through Numis Securities Limited, reflects the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value. The purchased shares will be held in Treasury, and the total voting rights in the company now stand at 539,070,465. This move may influence shareholder notifications under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

More about Jupiter Fund Management Plc

Jupiter Fund Management Plc operates in the financial services industry, focusing on asset management. The company provides a range of investment products and services, targeting both individual and institutional investors, with a market focus on delivering strong investment performance.

data.title: Peak Minerals Rebrands as Sranan Gold Corp. to Focus on Suriname Exploration
data.description:
The latest update is out from Peak Minerals Ltd. ( (TSE:PEK) ).

Peak Minerals Ltd. has announced a name change to Sranan Gold Corp., reflecting its focus on gold exploration in Suriname. The company’s shares will trade under the new symbol ‘SRAN’ on the Canadian Securities Exchange starting April 8, 2025. This rebranding aligns with the company’s strategic focus on its Tapanahony Project, which shows promising gold exploration potential. The name ‘Sranan’ signifies Suriname in the local dialect, highlighting the company’s commitment to the region. The change is not expected to disrupt trading activities, and shareholders are not required to take any action regarding their share certificates.

More about Peak Minerals Ltd.

Peak Minerals Ltd. is a company involved in mineral exploration and the acquisition of mineral property assets, primarily in Suriname. The company focuses on the Tapanahony Project, a significant gold exploration site in Suriname, and also explores the Aida Property in the Kamloops Mining Division.

Average Trading Volume: 66,326

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: American Shared Hospital Services Appoints New CEO
data.description:
American Shared Hospital Services ( (AMS) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 3, 2025, American Shared Hospital Services announced the appointment of Gary Delanois as the new Chief Executive Officer, succeeding Raymond Stachowiak, who will remain as Executive Chairman. The company reported strong financial results for 2024, with a 32.9% increase in revenue driven by strategic expansion and operational strength. The acquisition of radiation therapy centers and new facility openings have been pivotal in this growth. The company is transitioning from a leasing model to a direct provider of radiation therapy services, aiming for sustainable long-term growth through increased patient volumes and operational enhancements.

More about American Shared Hospital Services

American Shared Hospital Services (AMS) is a leading provider of turnkey solutions to cancer treatment centers, health systems, and cancer networks in North and South America. The company specializes in stereotactic radiosurgery equipment and advanced radiation therapy cancer treatment services, offering integrated cancer care in partnership with health systems.

data.title: BH Macro Limited Acquires 150,000 Own Shares for Treasury
data.description:
BH Macro Shs GBP ( (GB:BHMG) ) has shared an announcement.

BH Macro Limited announced the purchase of 150,000 of its ordinary Sterling shares on the London Stock Exchange from J.P. Morgan Securities plc. The shares were bought at prices ranging from 373.00 to 381.50 pence, with a weighted average price of 377.6812 pence, and will be held in treasury. This transaction affects the total number of shares in issue, impacting the company’s voting rights, which now total 515,368,807. This move could influence the company’s market positioning and shareholder value.

More about BH Macro Shs GBP

BH Macro Limited is a closed-ended collective investment scheme based in Guernsey, focusing on investments in various financial instruments. The company operates with limited liability and is listed on the London Stock Exchange, engaging in the management and trading of its shares.

data.title: Haleon PLC Announces Virtual 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
An update from Haleon PLC Sponsored ADR ( (HLN) ) is now available.

On April 4, 2025, Haleon PLC announced the availability of documents for its 2025 Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled to be held virtually on May 28, 2025. The AGM will be broadcast from the company’s London offices, and shareholders can access the Notice of the AGM, Form of Proxy, and AGM Voting Instruction Card on Haleon’s website. This announcement underscores Haleon’s commitment to maintaining transparency and engagement with its shareholders, reflecting its strategic focus on leveraging digital channels for stakeholder communication.

More about Haleon PLC Sponsored ADR

Haleon PLC is a global leader in consumer health, focusing on delivering better everyday health with humanity. The company offers a diverse product portfolio across five major categories: Oral Health, Pain Relief, Respiratory Health, Digestive Health, and Vitamins, Minerals, and Supplements (VMS). Haleon is known for its long-standing brands such as Advil, Sensodyne, Panadol, Voltaren, Theraflu, Otrivin, Polident, parodontax, and Centrum, which are built on trusted science and innovation.
